title: Chennai City Gangsta Lyrics Vanakkam Chennai Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Chennai City Gangsta
Singers: Anirudh, Adhi, Country Chicken
Lyrics: Hip Hop Tamilan Adhi
Music: Anirudh Ravichander
Movie: Vanakkam Chennai (2013)		.


Lyrics in Thanglish
Exact translation of tamil words

Oh yeah hey Madrasi people
this hard kaur
all the way fom Mumbai
this time u hear this
u better pump up the volume
turn up the volume
u better pump up the volume
here we got the gaanaa swag
Mumbai time is very sad
make u rain like super stars
to with models of hip hop
to the bandraa like Punjabi
..sonna baabi
here we show u how to drink
n we show how to party

u ain't got no Goa beach
u ain't got no Sharukh khaan
ain't got no India gate.
we shoot question u are so late..

..
that that only my arms
so what u wanna say
saala hip hop tamizha

Ungaluku India Gate-u
engaluku LIC weight-u
unagaluku Goa-la beachu
engaluku marinaa thaan maasu
unga ooru chappaathi kuruma
enga ooru idle pola varumaa
naanga chennai city boysu
summa gammunu kedamaa.. (2)

I'm a Chennai city gangsta
I'm a Chennai city gangsta

I'm a Chennai city gangsta

Ok ok I'm a Madarasi
nee dhilrindha modhi paarudaa paradesi
unmaiyaana natupuku vishuvaasi- aana
prachana pannaakka pendhium mugaraasi
indu Chennai city

naanga chinna pasanga machi

yo here is my visiting card

unga kitta irukattum aayiram thaan

Naan oru thadava sonna
nooru thadava sonna madhiri

Natupuchu prachanana naan varuven
engaluku prachanana ne varuva
nammaluku parachana yaar varuvaa
de Tamil nade kelambum da...

Mudiya vachi malaya iulupom
vandha mala ponaa *****...

engakitta venaaa

Idhuthaanga Chennai gethu
natputhaan enga sothu

idhu Chennai da Chennai da..

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song celebrates the lively culture of Chennai, showcasing the city's unique swag and energy.

What is the plot context of the song in the movie?

In Vanakkam Chennai, the song reflects the protagonist's connection to the city and his vibrant lifestyle.

Who are the singers and music director of the song?

The song features vocals by Anirudh and Adhi, with music composed by Anirudh Ravichander.

When was the song released?

The song was released on July 28, 2013.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Chennai City Gangsta, the vibrant energy of Chennai is brought to life through a catchy beat and lively lyrics. The song encapsulates the spirit of the city, making it a perfect anthem for celebrations and parties. It conveys a sense of pride and joy, inviting listeners to embrace the local culture. With its upbeat tempo, the track evokes feelings of excitement and motivation, making it a favorite among fans.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Chennai City Gangsta from Vanakkam Chennai is an electrifying anthem that perfectly captures the vibrant spirit of Chennai. With Anirudh's infectious beats and Adhi's dynamic vocals, this track is sure to get you on your feet and dancing. Experience the unique blend of hip-hop and local flavor that makes this song a must-listen!
stanzaMeanings: Oh yeah, hey people from Madras, this is hard, coming all the way from Mumbai. This time, you better turn up the volume. We have the swag. Mumbai time is sad, making it rain like superstars with models of hip hop. Here we show you how to drink and how to party.
You don't have a Goa beach, you don't have Shah Rukh Khan, you don't have India Gate. We ask questions, and you are so late.
That’s only my arms, so what do you want to say, dude? Hip hop Tamizha.
For you, India Gate; for us, LIC weight; for you, Goa beach; for us, it's Marina. Your town has chapati, our town has idli. Will it come like that? We are Chennai city boys, just chilling around.
I'm a Chennai city gangsta. I'm a Chennai city gangsta. I'm a Chennai city gangsta. I'm a Chennai city gangsta. I'm a Chennai city gangsta.

Okay, okay, I'm a Madarasi. Look at the style. A foreigner, truly a native, causing trouble. Look at the girls in Chennai city. We are just small boys, but we are very busy. Here is my visiting card, come to the free tea shop.
You have a thousand with you, but our leader is still a SUPER STAR.
When I say it once, it's like saying it a hundred times.
When there is trouble, I will come. When we have trouble, who will come for us? The Tamil land will shout...
We will give our lives for friendship. If we need it, we will give it.
This is Chennai, the place where we lift our hands. This is Chennai, oh Chennai...
I'm a Chennai city gangsta. I'm a Chennai city gangsta. I'm a Chennai city gangsta. I'm a Chennai city gangsta. I'm a Chennai city gangsta.
